problem: Dental practices need an all-in-one AI-powered practice management ecosystem that centralizes communications, streamlines operations, and boosts production through intelligent automation
solution: All-in-one AI-powered practice management platform serving 5,000+ practices with AI agent for call handling, call intelligence, VoIP phone system, texting, reminders, digital forms, scheduling, payments, reviews, analytics, and insurance verifications in a unified ecosystem that reduces administrative workload and increases production
